questions.question: What programming languages are you proficient in?
questions.ideal_answer: I am proficient in Python, Java, and SQL.

questions.question: Can you list some of the machine learning frameworks you have experience with?
questions.ideal_answer: I have experience with TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, and XGBoost.

questions.question: What is your experience with cloud platforms?
questions.ideal_answer: I have experience with AWS, specifically with EC2, S3, and IAM.

questions.question: How do you approach building a REST API for serving machine learning models?
questions.ideal_answer: I use frameworks like FastAPI or Flask to build the API, and integrate it with a backend database like PostgreSQL.

questions.question: Can you explain the concept of containerization and how you have used it in your projects?
questions.ideal_answer: Containerization is a way to package an application and its dependencies into a single container. I have used Docker to containerize services and deploy them on AWS EC2.

questions.question: How do you handle data analysis and visualization in your projects?
questions.ideal_answer: I use libraries like Pandas and Matplotlib to perform exploratory data analysis and build dashboards.

questions.question: Can you describe your experience with natural language processing and how you have applied it in your projects?
questions.ideal_answer: I have experience with NLP libraries like spaCy and have applied it in projects like building a resume-screening pipeline using spaCy NLP and XGBoost.

questions.question: How do you approach building a machine learning pipeline, from data preprocessing to model deployment?
questions.ideal_answer: I follow a structured approach, starting with data preprocessing, then building and training the model, and finally deploying it using REST APIs and containerization.

questions.question: Can you explain the concept of transfer learning and how you have used it in your projects?
questions.ideal_answer: Transfer learning is a technique where a pre-trained model is used as a starting point for a new model. I have used transfer learning in projects like building an image classification model using MobileNetV2 transfer learning in TensorFlow.

questions.question: Can you describe your experience with DevOps tools and how you have applied them in your projects?
questions.ideal_answer: I have experience with DevOps tools like Jenkins and have used it to set up CI/CD pipelines for deploying containerized services on AWS EC2.
